expected.notes: Candidate on STEM OPT enrolled in government-subsidized health plan triggers financial self-sufficiency warning; is_nra=yes from branch 2 (stem_opt + years<6).

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'subsidized_health_plan_visa'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.has_govt_health_plan eq yes
  - answers.stage in ['opt', 'stem_opt', 'h1b']
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
